channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 18.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Zelenskyy thanks UK for intercepting Russian shadow fleet oil tanker after armed forces board vessel - UK politics live
item.description: Zelenskyy thanks UK for intercepting Russian shadow fleet oil tanker after armed forces board vessel - UK politics live

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Wes Streeting plans to increase high-skilled immigration if he becomes PM
item.description: Wes Streeting plans to increase high-skilled immigration if he becomes PM

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Nandy suggests more money will be allocated for defence after Healey’s resignation
item.description: Nandy suggests more money will be allocated for defence after Healey’s resignation

item.title: i Politics: Andy Burnham: I’ll keep the triple lock, and give pensioners a tax cut
item.description: Andy Burnham: I’ll keep the triple lock, and give pensioners a tax cut

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Farage vows to ban foreign nationals from social housing as byelection looms
item.description: Farage vows to ban foreign nationals from social housing as byelection looms

item.title: FT UK Politics: UK intercepts Russian shadow fleet oil tanker in English Channel
item.description: UK intercepts Russian shadow fleet oil tanker in English Channel

item.title: The Telegraph: Trump to confront Starmer over immigration at G7 - The Telegraph
item.description: Trump to confront Starmer over immigration at G7 - The Telegraph

item.title: The Telegraph: Here’s how we should fight Makerfield, Prime Minister - The Telegraph
item.description: Here’s how we should fight Makerfield, Prime Minister - The Telegraph

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Cabinet ministers asked to look for cuts to fund UK defence spending increase
item.description: Cabinet ministers asked to look for cuts to fund UK defence spending increase

item.title:
Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: This from Wes Streeting does a decent job of outlining an agenda: expand high-skill migration, Brexit/EU, energy, housebuilding, and tax reform.
Overlaps with my suggestions (see next post).
Also very "Blairite" - ...
item.description:
This from Wes Streeting does a decent job of outlining an agenda: expand high-skill migration, Brexit/EU, energy, housebuilding, and tax reform.
Overlaps with my suggestions (see next post).
Also very "Blairite" - ...
